measurement_note: Size is L, the legal text length. Each even-length input alternates one-letter words and spaces and already matches the required distribution. The Accepted split/count/join method and an independent formulation deriving the space count from text length minus joined-word length use O(L) time. A correct slower builder explicitly copies its entire accumulated prefix for each emitted character, takes O(L^2) time, completes all legal 8/32/100 tiers, and is rejected only by scaling. A Python-level manual tokenizer draft was discarded because interpreter loop overhead did not calibrate as same-class against the C-level string primitives.
